contests.title: Amazon Nova AI Hackathon
contests.description: Welcome to the Amazon Nova AI Hackathon! Amazon Nova is a portfolio of foundation models and services that deliver frontier intelligence and industry-leading price performance. This is your chance to invent with freedom and build with Nova’s capabilities, including advanced reasoning, tool use, multimodal understanding, voice AI, and UI workflow automation. Nova 2 Lite, a fast, cost-effective reasoning model for everyday tasks. Nova 2 Sonic, a speech-to-speech model for conversational AI. Nova Act is a service to build and manage fleets of agents for automating production UI workflows with high reliability. Nova multimodal embeddings: A state-of-the-art multimodal embedding model. Join and build innovative Gen AI applications using Amazon Nova! Why Participate? Innovate with Next-Gen AI. Explore the frontiers of generative AI and apply Nova's differentiated features to solve real-world problems. Real-World Impact. Develop solutions that deliver measurable value for businesses or create meaningful benefits for communities. Compete for Prizes. With a prize pool of $40,000 in cash and $55,000 in AWS credits, your innovative projects could earn significant rewards. Learn and Grow. Access dedicated resources, code examples, technical documentation, virtual workshops, and office hours to support your journey. Showcase Your Skills. Gain recognition for your expertise and show everyone your hard work. Get Started Amazon Nova 2 developer guide for foundation models and for Nova Act Amazon Nova website More Resources to help you!

contests.title: Gemini Live Agent Challenge
contests.description: Hey builders! 🛑 Stop typing, and start interacting! We are moving beyond the text box. The future isn't about just chatting with AI—it's about immersive, real-time experiences. To celebrate the power of multimodal AI, we’re challenging you to build the next generation of agents that can help you see 🙈, hear 🙉, speak 🙊, and create in the Gemini Live Agent Challenge.

contests.title: GitLab AI Hackathon
contests.description: AI writes code. That's expected now. The real opportunity? Everything else. Planning. Security. Compliance. Deployments. These are the bottlenecks that slow teams down every day. And they're wide open for automation. We're opening up the GitLab Duo Agent Platform and inviting developers worldwide to build AI agents that help you and your team to build secure software faster. Not chatbots that answer questions. Agents that jump into workflows, respond to events, and take action on your behalf. Think of it as building a digital teammate for every developer using GitLab. Why Join? Be early: Get access to the GitLab Duo Agent Platform for the duration of the hackathon while it’s fresh! Learn it. Build on it. Shape it. Learn how to build agents that assist you with tedious tasks such as creating tests Learn how to build a flow of agents and orchestrate an entire team of purpose-built agents to build & deploy feature requests from creating, testing, security scanning to deployment. Make an impact: Your agent could ship to thousands of GitLab users. This isn't just a side project that sits in a repo. Win $65,000 in prizes. Compete for the Grand Prize or win one of our category prices Get Started Join Discord and get to know each other in #ai-hackathon. Explore GitLab Duo Agent Platform. Request Access to the GitLab AI Hackathon group. Learn how to create GitLab custom Agents. Learn how to create GitLab Flows. Discover what’s possible in our GitLab Duo prompt library.
contests.summary: AI writes code. That's expected now. The real opportunity? Everything else. Planning. Security. Compliance. Deployments. These are the bottlenecks that slow teams down every day. And they're wide open...

contests.title: DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI Hackathon
contests.description: WELCOME The DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI Hackathon challenges developers, builders, and creators to design and launch new, working AI-powered applications using DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI’s full-stack features. From model training to deployment, this hackathon is about shipping real, production-ready AI — not just prototypes. Whether you’re exploring AI for the first time or scaling advanced machine learning workflows, this is your opportunity to build impactful applications on a developer-first cloud platform designed for speed, simplicity, and scale. Why join? Learn to build and deploy full-stack AI apps with DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI. Experiment with GPU-powered AI infrastructure and production-ready workflows. Compete for cash prizes and build something you can showcase. Get Started Signup for a DigitalOcean account! Check out the DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI documentation Check out DigitalOcean's general documentation About DigitalOcean DigitalOcean is the cloud built for developers. With powerful infrastructure, predictable pricing, and intuitive tools, DigitalOcean makes it easy for startups and growing teams to build, deploy, and scale applications without unnecessary complexity. About DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI is a full-stack AI platform that simplifies the entire machine learning lifecycle. With GPU-backed compute, flexible workflows, and seamless deployment, Gradient AI enables developers to move from idea to production faster all within DigitalOcean’s unified cloud ecosystem. In Partnership with Major League Hacking This hackathon is proudly supported by Major League Hacking (MLH), the global leader in developer hackathons. MLH empowers builders worldwide through inclusive, high-quality events and provides participants with access to resources, tooling, and community to help them succeed.
contests.summary: WELCOME The DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI Hackathon challenges developers, builders, and creators to design and launch new, working AI-powered applications using DigitalOcean Gradient™ AI’s full-stack fea...

contests.title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon
contests.description: 🚀 Airia AI Agent Challenge Build the Future of Enterprise AI Join us for an exciting virtual hackathon where you'll create cutting-edge AI agents that transform how people work. Whether you're bringing AI directly into users' daily tools or building sophisticated multi-agent systems, this is your opportunity to showcase innovation that matters. 🎯 Challenge Tracks Track 1: Airia Everywhere Meet users where they already are. Build AI agents that seamlessly integrate into the platforms people use every day. No more context-switching, no more friction—just intelligent assistance exactly when and where it's needed. Target Platforms: 🌐 Browser extensions 📧 Outlook & email inboxes 💬 Chat widgets 💼 Slack & Microsoft Teams 📁 SharePoint 📱 WhatsApp 🔌 Custom APIs for iterative workflows Think: Personal AI assistants that live in your browser, email triaging bots, Slack integrations that automate team workflows, or browser extensions that enhance productivity across any web application. Track 2: Active Agents Orchestrate intelligence across your entire tech stack. Design sophisticated multi-agent workflows that autonomously gather data, make decisions, and perform actions across 2+ systems. Build the autonomous workforce of tomorrow. Key Capabilities: 🤝 Multi-system integrations 👤 Human-in-the-loop (HITL) decision points 📄 Dynamic document generation 🔄 Nested agent architectures ⚡ Automated cross-platform workflows Think: Contract analysis pipelines, automated compliance monitoring systems, intelligent customer onboarding workflows, or research agents that synthesize information from multiple sources.
contests.summary: 🚀 Airia AI Agent Challenge Build the Future of Enterprise AI Join us for an exciting virtual hackathon where you'll create cutting-edge AI agents that transform how people work. Whether you're bringi...

contests.title: Byte 2 Beat
contests.description: Thank you for participating in Byte 2 Beat Important: To be eligible for prizes, you MUST Join our discord: https://discord.com/invite/SZhaZcNh4D. Aditionally, you must be a student (any grade is fine) Dataset: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1oTqMR3AM3FGjnAXPZZuqDLH7D4rcOhNbZ* *For 1st Place Projects, we would like you to find a unique dataset for more impactful and innovative projects and results. Cardiovascular Disease remains the leading cause of death globally. In this hackathon, you’ll use real, de-identified biomedical data to build machine learning models that support early detection, progression forecasting, or interpretability of Cardiovascular Disease risk. Our goal: make serious computational health innovation accessible to every motivated high school or undergraduate student, no lab or insider network required. Hack4Health democratizes computational medicine by giving students access to authentic biomedical datasets, pragmatic tooling, and strong mentorship.

contests.title: Agents Assemble - The Healthcare AI Endgame
contests.description: NOTE: We are not accepting any additional applications or inquiries for judges at this time. Due to the high volume of requests, we will not be responding to messages regarding judging opportunities. Thank you for your interest and understanding. Agents Assemble: The Healthcare AI Endgame Challenge Build Interoperable Healthcare Agents at the Intersection of MCP, A2A, and FHIR. We have all watched the AI in healthcare trailers - the hype, the theories, and the cool demos. But now, we have entered the Endgame. At Prompt Opinion, we define this phase as "The Last Mile" - the critical gap where raw intelligence must be converted into actionable deliverables. To conquer this mile, we cannot work alone. We are proud to launch Agents Assemble, a builder’s competition designed to prove that the power of AI lies in collaboration. Our platform provides the headquarters for this mission, giving you native access to the industry's best tools to build in two distinct ways: you can forge a Superpower (building the MCP tools that fuel the ecosystem), or you can rise up to build a Full Agent (equipping those superpowers to tackle a specific healthcare challenge). The technology is ready. The platform is open. It’s time to assemble. Why Participate? This competition is a launchpad for AI solutions that will power future healthcare workflows. Here is why you should join: Lucrative Cash Prizes: Compete for a total prize pool of $25,000 USD in cash, including a $7,500 Grand Prize. Widespread Visibility: Successful projects will be published in the Prompt Opinion Marketplace, making them discoverable and invokable by organizations across the ecosystem. Develop Skills That Matter: Gain hands-on experience with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Agent-to-Agent (A2A) standards for building AI agents. Build Healthcare Ready Solutions: Learn how by using the SHARP extension specs from Prompt Opinion, your tools and agents will seamlessly propagate data context using FHIR through multi-agent call chains. Collaborate and Network: Join a community of like-minded innovators and connect with leaders at Prompt Opinion who are shaping the future of AI infrastructure. Bragging Rights: Beyond the prizes, you will walk away with the pride of having built a functional, standards-compliant AI solution that can integrate directly into a clinician's workspace.
contests.summary: NOTE: We are not accepting any additional applications or inquiries for judges at this time. Due to the high volume of requests, we will not be responding to messages regarding judging opportunities. ...

contests.title: Frostbyte Hackathon
contests.description: Join a global AI and tech competition where innovators, developers, and creators from around the world come together to solve real-world challenges. Whether you’re building AI models, data-driven solutions, blockchain applications, or sustainable tech innovations, Frostbyte Hackathon 2026 is the platform to showcase your skills and make an impact. Why Frostbyte Hackathon is unique: 🌐 Global Reach: Compete alongside participants from around the world 🎓 Expert Mentorship: Learn from top AI, tech, and industry leaders 🏆 Awards & Recognition: Win prizes, swags, and innovation support 📜 Official Certificates: Make your portfolio shine 🤝 Networking & Opportunities: Connect with peers, and tech experts Hackathon Themes Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning – Build AI-driven solutions, predictive models, or intelligent automation tools. Data Analytics & Big Data – Analyze datasets to generate insights, improve decision-making, or visualize information creatively. FinTech & Blockchain – Innovative applications in finance, crypto, secure transactions, or decentralized systems. Healthcare & BioTech – Solutions for patient care, medical data analysis, wellness apps, or biotechnology innovations. Sustainability & Climate Tech – Projects focused on renewable energy, environment monitoring, or sustainable practices. Business & Management Tools – SaaS platforms, productivity apps, ERP solutions, or workflow optimizations. Cybersecurity & Privacy – Build tools to protect data, secure applications, or prevent digital threats. IoT & Smart Systems – Internet of Things applications, automation, smart devices, and connected solutions.

contests.title: Dev Season of Code
contests.description: Dev Season of Code (DSOC) 2026 is a global, professional hackathon designed to encourage innovation, collaboration, and real-world problem solving through technology. The event brings together coders, professionals, and independent developers to build impactful solutions across software engineering, artificial intelligence, data, and emerging technologies. DSOC focuses on practical implementation, open innovation, and hands-on learning, giving participants the opportunity to work on meaningful projects, receive expert feedback, and gain global recognition. Whether you’re exploring new technologies or refining production-ready solutions, Dev Season of Code is a platform to learn by building. For Jury and Sponsorship : devseasonofcode@gmail.com What Makes Dev Season of Code Unique 🌍 Global Participation – Open to developers worldwide 💡 Project-Driven Learning – Emphasis on real, usable solutions 👩‍⚖️ Experienced Jury Panel – Industry professionals and researchers 📜 Official & Verifiable Certificates – Lifetime verification 🤝 Community & Growth – Opportunities for future collaborations and events Hackathon Themes Participants may submit projects under one or more of the following themes: 1. Software Development & Engineering Web applications, mobile apps, APIs, system architecture, developer tools, and scalable platforms. 2. Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning AI models, automation systems, predictive analytics, natural language processing, and intelligent applications. 3. Data Science & Business Analytics Data pipelines, analytics dashboards, insight generation, and decision-support systems for businesses. 4. AI-Driven Commercial Decision Systems Solutions that use AI or advanced analytics to support business strategy, forecasting, and operational decision-making. 5. Finance & Financial Technology Fintech platforms, digital payments, financial management systems, and investment or accounting tools. 6. Finance & Tax Technology Innovations in tax automation, compliance platforms, financial reporting, and regulatory technology solutions. 7. Sales & Marketing Technology Customer acquisition platforms, marketing analytics tools, CRM systems, sales automation, and growth technologies. 8. Business Management & Consultancy Solutions Enterprise management tools, consulting frameworks, operational strategy platforms, and workflow optimization systems. 9. Business Development & Commercial Platforms Solutions designed to support startup growth, partnerships, market expansion, and commercial strategy. 10. Design & Manufacturing Innovation Projects related to product design, furniture design, digital fabrication, manufacturing optimization, and industrial innovation.
